title: DocuMind AI
subtitle: AI / RAG / Document Intelligence / API

summary.es: Aplicación de inteligencia artificial para analizar documentos, extraer información relevante y permitir consultas en lenguaje natural mediante una experiencia tipo chat.
summary.en: AI application for analyzing documents, extracting relevant information, and enabling natural-language questions through a chat-style experience.

es: Permite subir documentos como PDFs o textos y hacer preguntas sobre su contenido.
Utiliza una arquitectura RAG para combinar búsqueda semántica con modelos de lenguaje.
Incluye indexación eficiente para consultas rápidas y respuestas contextualizadas.
Combina backend en FastAPI con frontend en React y TypeScript.
en: It lets users upload documents such as PDFs or text files and ask questions about their content.
It uses a RAG architecture to combine semantic retrieval with language models.
It includes efficient indexing for fast queries and contextualized answers.
It combines a FastAPI backend with a React and TypeScript frontend.

content: Alba Mora de la Sen is currently developing DocuMind AI, an AI application that uses RAG, semantic search, embeddings, and language models to let users upload documents and chat with their content.

summary.en: Responsive portfolio website built with React and Tailwind that now includes an AI chat and a FastAPI API for answering questions about Alba using structured portfolio data.

La API usa datos estructurados del portfolio para responder de forma contextualizada.
en: It includes animated sections and interactive components.
It integrates an AI chat widget connected to its own API.
The API uses structured portfolio data to answer questions contextually.

content: Alba Mora de la Sen built a Personal Portfolio Website, a responsive portfolio website created with React and Tailwind CSS that now includes an AI chat widget and a FastAPI backend API.
